explicit_text: I was born and raised in Saint Paul, Minnesota, where much of my childhood unfolded. My family lived near the old Schmidt Brewery on the West End, and later we moved around the west side of Saint Paul. After my parents separated, I stayed in Saint Paul with my grandmother while my mom eventually moved back to be closer to me and my sister. Growing up in Saint Paul shaped much of my early life and family dynamics.

explicit_text: After my parents separated, my dad moved to a townhome in Apple Valley, Minnesota. Meanwhile, my sister and I stayed in Saint Paul with our grandmother. Apple Valley represented where my dad started his new life apart from my mom and us, marking a physical and emotional distance within our family during that time.
